subcodes.first_line: He Who was hidden in the treasury of knowledge and concealed within the repositories of infallibility and power hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی من کان مکنونا فی کنز العلم و مخزونا فی خزائن العصمه و القدره و مسطورا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
